metadata.description: Claude Code plugin: 89 specialist agents, trigger-safe workflow routing, worktree-ready autonomous loops, design intelligence, 10-language code graph, multilingual semantic RAG, project memory, confidence gates, and live preview server. Requires Node 22.5+ with node:sqlite. No Docker, no native deps.
